PRIVATE PLACEMENT
123456 WFID:9999999 1/1/2025, 1:00:00 PM
Confidential
2Y USD Autocallable Memory Coupon Phoenix Index Basket Linked
Notes
Indicative Termsheet 1st of January 2025
Proprietary & Confidential ( Not For Further Distribution)
THIS PRODUCT IS NOT CAPITAL PROTECTED
This is a Term Sheet for a structured product involving derivatives.
General Terms
Issuer Santander International Products Plc (A2 by Moody's)
Guarantor Banco Santander S.A. (A+ by S&P, A2 by Moody's, A by Fitch)
Dealer Santander International (on an effort basis)
ISIN Code XS1111111111
Series Number 2001
Listing Vienna MTF
Security Notes
Status Senior Unsecured
Currency USD
Issue Size USD 2,000,000
Issue Price 100%
Denomination USD 10,000 and Integral Multiples of USD 1,000 in excess thereof
Calculation Amount USD 1,000
Trade Date 1 January 2025
Strike Date 1 January 2025
Issue Date 8 January 2025
Maturity Date 8 January 2027, subject to adjustment in accordance with the Business Day Convention and subject
to Automatic Early Redemption Provision below
Underlying j Name Bloomberg Exchange ISIN Currency Initial
Level
1 S&P 500 SPX Index New York Stock
Exchange
US0000000001 USD 4800.5
2 Russell 2000 RTY Index New York Stock
Exchange
US0000000002 USD 2000.25
Business Day T2 & New York
Calculation Agent Banco Santander, S.A.
Rate of Interest
Interest Basis Index Basket Linked Interest
Rate of Interest In respect of each Interest Payment Date (n) (for n=1 to 8), and subject to Automatic Early
Redemption Provisions below, the Rate of Interest shall be determined by the Calculation
Agent as:
(1) If the Barrier Condition is satisfied, then:
(Rate + SumRate) * Calculation Amount
(2) Otherwise,
0% * Calculation Amount
Where:
Barrier Condition shall be satisfied if PerfMin (n) is equal to or greater than the Coupon
Barrier Level
Coupon Barrier Level means 60%
Rate means 1.75%
SumRate means the sum of all previous Rates since (but not including) the last
Observation Date on which the relevant Barrier Condition was satisfied (or if non, the
Issue Date)
Observation Date (n) n Observation Date
1 1 April 2025
2 1 July 2025
3 1 October 2025
4 1 January 2026
5 1 April 2026
6 1 July 2026
7 1 October 2026
8 1 January 2027
Interest Payment Date (n) n Interest Payment Date
1 8 April 2025
2 8 July 2025
3 8 October 2025
4 8 January 2026
5 8 April 2026
6 8 July 2026
7 8 October 2026
8 8 January 2027
Automatic Early Redemption (AER) Provisions
AER Condition The Securities shall be early redeemed on any AER Date (n) paying an amount equal to
the AER Amount if the PerfMin (n) is greater than or equal the AER Level (n)
AER Level means 100%
AER Amount 100% * Calculation Amount
Redemption Basis Index Basket Linked Redemption
Final Redemption Amount In respect of the Maturity Date
Where:
Final Redemption Condition shall be satisfied if PerfMin (f) is greater than or equal to the
Redemption Barrier Level.
Redemption Barrier Level means 60%
PerfMin (f) means, on Final Observation Date, the performance of the Underlying (j) with
the lowest calculated performance determined by the Calculation Agent.
Final Observation Date 1 January 2027
